2026-0497
2026-05-26NDNational Defence ActReappointment of a full-time member of the Military Grievances External Review CommitteeRe-appointment of Nina Frid of Ottawa, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Military Grievances External Review Committee, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years, effective June 2, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a full-time member of the Military Grievances External Review Committee
precis: Re-appointment of Nina Frid of Ottawa, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Military Grievances External Review Committee, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years, effective June 2, 2026.
